title: Recubrimientos para pisos industriales para cocinas comerciales - Elite Mexico
content:
Commercial Kitchens
Maintaining a clean commercial kitchen, while adhering to local, state and federal regulations, can be extremely difficult. Protective resinous coatings offer several advantages over traditional flooring such as conventionally used commercial tile. Our surfaces are slip resistance, stain resistant, antimicrobial and are easy to clean and maintain. Optional thermal shock resistant flooring available for forced steam cleaning or boiling water.
Advantages
Anti-microbial with no grout lines
Seamless and non-porous
Thermal shock resistant
Variable slip resistance and coefficient of friction
Resistant to chemicals and food spillage
Abrasion resistant
Easy to clean and maintain
FDA, USDA* and CFIA** acceptable
Vertical applications for wall protection
Suitable for extreme heat or cold conditions
Variety of standard colors with custom colors on request
* Can be used in USDA facilities based on FSIS Directive 11,000.4 (Rev. 1), November 24, 1995.
** Agriculture Canada (also known as Canadian Food Inspection Agency).
Commercial kitchens, delis and butcheries
Restaurants
School cafeterias
Freezers and cold storage
Warehouses and food storage
Packaging and food processing
Paramount
Urethane Cement
